---
title: "CV"
---

# CV

A PDF version of my CV is available here:

[Download CV](files/Ajay_Dev_CV.pdf)

## Education

**PhD in Astrophysics**  
International Centre for Radio Astronomy Research, University of Western Australia  

Thesis: *Baryons in dark matter haloes from multi-wavelength surveys*

## Research experience

**PhD Researcher**  
International Centre for Radio Astronomy Research, University of Western Australia

- Measured the neutral hydrogen content of galaxy groups using spectral stacking.
- Developed empirical scaling relations connecting HI, stellar, and hot gas mass to halo mass.
- Combined radio, optical, and X-ray surveys to study the baryon content of dark matter haloes.

## Skills

- Radio spectral-line analysis
- HI stacking
- Galaxy group catalogues
- Multi-wavelength survey analysis
- R, Python, Bash
- ASKAP, ALFALFA, GAMA, WAVES, eROSITA
